narrative: Hawkish Fed rhetoric and BoJ neutral rate signals drive G10 price action — Bessent's 'tap the brakes' comment fuels September hike bets while BoJ's Tamura targets a 2% neutral rate. USD/JPY holds at 161.70 as 275bp carry sustains the bid despite intervention threats; gold lower -0.16% near $4,000; equities -0.10%; DXY -0.08%; VIX 18.6. Watch US PCE inflation data at 12:30 UTC for the next policy catalyst.
